builds_on.name: retrieval-augmented generation (RAG)
builds_on.evidence: “Search-o1, which integrates the reasoning process of LRMs with two core components: an agentic retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) mechanism”

builds_on.name: agentic RAG
builds_on.evidence: “Unlike them, Search-o1 employs an agentic RAG technique that guides the model to actively decode search queries when facing knowledge shortages”
